trademark.label: Designed with passion.

trademark.title: Acme Store is a registered trademark
trademark.intro: The Acme Store brand is a registered trademark. Use of the name, logo, or figurative elements visible on this site is protected by law.

cookies.title: Cookie settings
cookies.intro: We use cookies to remember your basket, show you personalised offers, and improve your shopping experience. Essential cookies are always active. For analytics and marketing, we ask for your consent.
cookies.customizeIntro: Choose the categories you'd like to enable. You can change your preferences at any time via the
cookies.customizeIntroSuffix: link at the bottom of the page.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Required for the basket, authentication, and payment. Cannot be disabled.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Google Analytics — helps us understand which products visitors are looking for.
cookies.marketingDesc: Meta Pixel — measures ad performance and shows you relevant offers.

furniture.title: Solid-wood furniture
furniture.subtitle: Minimal, durable pieces in solid oak — nightstands, console tables and more for every room.

lighting.title: Lighting collection
lighting.subtitle: Table and floor lamps in glass, brass and marble — dimmable warm light for any space.

outdoor.title: Outdoor & garden
outdoor.subtitle: Solar-powered path and garden lighting — wire-free, weatherproof and easy to install.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.body: The link you followed is incorrect, has expired, or the page has been moved. Let's get you back on track.

form.intro: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you promptly and helpfully.
form.subject: Subject
form.subjectPlaceholder: What would you like to ask us about?
form.success: ✓ Thank you! Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.errorGeneric: The message could not be sent.

home.title: Spring Sale 2026 — Acme Store | Furniture, Lighting & Outdoor
home.description: Spring Sale 2026 at Acme Store. Solid-wood furniture, table and floor lamps, plus wire-free solar outdoor lighting — genuine discounts and fast delivery.

default.title: Your order has been placed!
default.subtitle: Thank you for your order. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.

paid.title: Payment successful — thank you!
paid.subtitle: Your payment has been confirmed. We are preparing your parcel for dispatch.
paid.line1: Automatic payment confirmation received from the processor.
paid.line2: We will call you to confirm delivery.
paid.line3: Dispatched by courier within 24-48 working hours.
paid.line4: Your invoice and order details have been emailed to you.

pending.title: Checking your payment...
pending.subtitle: Please wait a few seconds — we are confirming your payment with the processor.
pending.line1: We refresh the payment status automatically over the next ~30 seconds.
pending.line2: If you abandoned the payment, you can return to your basket and try again.
pending.line3: If the payment succeeds but you don't see the confirmation, email us at {email}.

cancelled.title: Payment cancelled
cancelled.subtitle: Your order was not completed. You can try again at any time.

failed.title: Payment failed
failed.subtitle: Your payment could not be processed. Please try a different payment method.
failed.lineRamburs: You can choose cash on delivery as an alternative.

refunded.title: Your order has been refunded
refunded.subtitle: Your payment has been returned. The amount will appear in your account within a few working days.
refunded.line1: Your parcel will not be dispatched (or has already been recovered).
refunded.line2: For questions about the refund, email us at {email}.

received.line1: Your order has been registered and sent to our team.
received.line2: We will call you to confirm your order.
received.line3: Dispatched by courier within 24-48 working hours.
received.line4: Payment is made by cash on delivery, when your parcel arrives.

unknown.line2: If you don't receive a confirmation shortly, email us at {email}.
